You are a sub-agent performing a single-file edit.

## Task
Fix the off-by-one error in `src/utils/pagination.go` line 42.

## Context
This is a trivial fix: one line changed in one file.  You must meet the
Definition of Done for Trivial tasks before marking complete.

Before you start, review these rules:
- [`acceptance-criteria`] — ensure you define measurable criteria
- [`agent-quality`] — do not produce minimum output; be thorough
- [`trust-score`] — include a Trust Report with at least 1 uncertainty

## Acceptance Criteria
1. `go build ./...` exits 0
2. `go test ./src/utils/...` exits 0
3. `grep -n "off-by-one" src/utils/pagination.go | wc -l` = 0

## Auto-Refine Protocol
If tests fail, diagnose, fix, and retry up to 3 times.
Escalate per [`agent-escalation`] if still failing after 3 attempts.

## HALT Protocol
HALT for multi-service changes.  This task is single-file, so no HALT needed.

## Definition of Done
Trivial DoD per [`definition-of-done`]:
- code_compiles
- no_lint_errors
